entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS124) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD PLATINUM MNS SERVICES AS REFLECTED IN SUBMISSION AU0777.02E.
2. TO ADD PLATINUM IDPS SERVICES AS REFLECTED IN SUBMISSION AU0778.02E.
3. TO ADD PLATINUM MFS SERVICES AS REFLECTED IN SUBMISSION AU0779.02E.
4. TO ADD PLATINUM VSS SERVICES AS REFLECTED IN SUBMISSION AU0780.02E.
5. TO ADD PLATINUM NBIP VPNS SERVICES AS REFLECTED IN SUBMISSION AU0781.02E.
6. TO ADD PLATINUM IPS SERVICES AS REFLECTED IN SUBMISSION AU0782.02.
7. TO ADD PRIMARY ACCESS SERVICES AS REFLECTED IN SUBMISSION AU0783.02E.
8. TO ADD SECONDARY ACCESS SERVICES AS REFLECTED IN SUBMISSION AU0796.02E.
9. TO ADD PRIMARY ACCESS SERVICES AS REFLECTED IN SUBMISSION AU0813.01E.
10. TO ADD SECONDARY ACCESS SERVICES AS REFLECTED IN SUBMISSION AU0814.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS1255) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. TO INCORPORATE PROPOSAL AU6437.02E, RECEIVED BY GSA ON NOVEMBER 25, 2019, WHICH PROPOSES TO ADD PRICING IN ORDER TO EXTEND THE NETWORX CONTRACT BY AN ADDITIONAL PERIOD OF UP TO THIRTY-EIGHT MONTHS: (ONE (1), TWO (2) MONTH BASE EXTENSION PERIOD WITH THREE (3) ONE YEAR EXTENSION OPTION PERIODS) FROM THE CURRENT CONTRACT END DATE OF MARCH 28, 2020 TO MAY 31, 2023

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
